steps.title: Punctuate the name phrase
steps.content: The phrase must identify the Slovak photographer by name, then introduce a nonessential "who" clause about how she describes her photos. There should be no comma between the occupation and the name, but there should be one before the "who" clause.

steps.title: Reject misplaced commas
steps.content: B omits the comma needed before the nonessential "who" clause. C places a comma between "photographer" and the name. D repeats that same wrong comma before the name. The version with only the comma after the full name is correct. The answer is A.
